_comment: Deep-rally study: on hard court, Ace (idx 4) vs Ace (idx 4), normal play (no forced shot policy). The objective drives the physics so that ~80% of rally shots' FIRST bounce lands BEHIND the service line (|z| >= 6.40, toward the baseline). Runs on top of the reduced movement (run_speed_scale 0.859) and ball speed (ball_speed_scale 0.85) game defaults, which are NOT searched here. Copy to e.g. autotune.deepbounce.config.json and run: .venv-autotune/bin/python scripts/autotune/tune.py --config autotune.deepbounce.config.json . Every number is editable.
_bounds_note: Search ranges are kept inside physically-valid regions; both extreme corners of this box were verified to pass all moon-test invariants (ITF rebound, flat solver accuracy at reduced speed, stretched-contact, shallow-feed). Widen a range only after re-checking `moon test` — notably aero_cd (>0.60 fails the flat solver reach) and rally_depth_min (>7.0 forces every stroke too deep and breaks the shallow-feed/stretched tests).
